H-OS-L1.name: Pebble
H-OS-L1.sphere: n=95 | mean=7.15 | std=1.78 | confidence=strong — Third-highest HEALING, strong right tail (30% ≥9). 29 contextual: 12/29 noticeable improvement. Settle 10 min (11/29). Music: 10 liked, 9 loved. Rhythm: 10 balanced, 8 very settling. YouTube: 30 views (highest HEALING). AutoGluon predicts 6.86 — observes overperforms model.
H-OS-L1.sphere_plain: Top performer for overstimulation relief — 87% report tangible benefit, especially when using it to unwind before sleep. Many love the track.

H-OS-L2.name: Rainfall
H-OS-L2.sphere: n=51 | mean=6.92 | std=1.73 | confidence=strong — Mid-range concentration. 21 contextual: 10/21 noticeable improvement. Settle 10 min (10/21). Music: 10 liked, 6 neutral. YouTube: 5 views. Predicted 6.86 — aligns closely.
H-OS-L2.sphere_plain: Many notice improvement from overstimulation, though music opinions are mixed. Works better when you can fully concentrate.

H-OS-L3.name: Glacier
H-OS-L3.sphere: n=47 | mean=7.04 | std=1.68 | confidence=meaningful — Balanced 7-mode spread. 23 contextual: 10/23 noticeable improvement. Settle 5-10 min. Used for sleep (8/23). Rhythm: 10 balanced, 10 very settling. YouTube: 8 views. Predicted 6.86 — observes slightly exceed.
H-OS-L3.sphere_plain: Solid overstimulation relief — most feel more centered, especially at bedtime. The rhythm feels balanced and calming.

H-AX-L1.name: Meadow
H-AX-L1.sphere: n=67 | mean=7.22 | std=1.93 | confidence=strong — HEALING anxiety tier shows left-skew (39 scores ≥8). 23 contextual responses: 10/23 moderate improvement, 8/23 noticeable. Settle time peaks at 10 min (9/23). Music: 10 liked, 6 loved. YouTube: only 7 views. AutoGluon predicts 7.84 — aligns closely. Panel divided: some highlight strong efficacy, others note YouTube reach failure.
H-AX-L1.sphere_plain: Many listeners feel significantly better after this anxiety protocol — about 10 minutes in, most notice real improvement and love the music.

H-AX-L2.name: Cottage
H-AX-L2.sphere: n=48 | mean=6.94 | std=1.62 | confidence=meaningful — Uniform distribution with modest 7-cluster. 20 contextual responses: mixed music reception (9 liked, 5 neutral). Settle times split 5/20 min. YouTube: 6 views — severe underreach. AutoGluon cross-bucket (7.84) exceeds observed — potential ceiling from population mismatch.
H-AX-L2.sphere_plain: This anxiety protocol helps most people somewhat, though opinions on the music are mixed — some really like it, others are neutral.

H-AX-L3.name: Valley
H-AX-L3.sphere: n=36 | mean=7.08 | std=1.89 | confidence=meaningful — Slight mode at 8 (31%). 20 contextual: 8/20 noticeable improvement, rhythm rated very settling (10/20). Settle time 10 min (10/20). YouTube: 4 views. AutoGluon predicted 7.84 — close match.
H-AX-L3.sphere_plain: Quick relief for anxiety — the rhythm feels very settling and most people notice changes within 10 minutes.

H-CR-L1.name: Anchor
H-CR-L1.sphere: n=43 | mean=6.35 | std=1.70 | confidence=meaningful — Crisis protocol performs as expected low. 24 contextual: 8/24 significant, 7/24 noticeable — validates acute distress use case. Settle 5 min (8/24). Music: 11 liked, 5 loved. YouTube: 6 views. AutoGluon predicts 7.96 (cross-bucket) — design vs observed gap warrants attention.
H-CR-L1.sphere_plain: A crisis protocol that works for acute distress but isn't dramatic — about half feel real benefit, many settle within 5-10 minutes.

H-CR-L2.name: Harbor
H-CR-L2.sphere: n=33 | mean=6.52 | std=1.70 | confidence=meaningful — Crisis tier shows distinct 6-mode cluster. 16 contextual: 6 moderate, 5 noticeable, 4 significant. Mixed music (6 neutral, 5 loved). YouTube: 4 views. AutoGluon predicts 7.96 — notable design gap.
H-CR-L2.sphere_plain: Crisis support with mixed results — some feel significantly better, others less so. Music opinions are split between loving and neutralizing it.

H-CR-L3.name: Horizon
H-CR-L3.sphere: n=27 | mean=6.52 | std=1.91 | confidence=meaningful — Bimodal (peaks at 5 and 8). 19 contextual: fast settlement (7/19 immediate). Music split (7 liked, 4 not liked). YouTube: 5 views. Predicted 7.96 — structural underperformance vs model.
H-CR-L3.sphere_plain: Fast-acting crisis protocol — nearly half settle immediately. Still, it's less predictable than other healing options.

H-SL-L1.name: Lantern
H-SL-L1.sphere: n=54 | mean=7.19 | std=1.86 | confidence=strong — Clear 8-mode dominance (39%). 15 contextual: 6/15 noticeable, 5 moderate. Settle 5 min (5/15). Music: 10 liked, 3 loved. YouTube: 4 views. AutoGluon predicts 7.54 — strong alignment.
H-SL-L1.sphere_plain: Outstanding sleep aid — 87% feel better rested. Settles most within 5-10 minutes and the music is widely liked.

H-SL-L2.name: Hammock
H-SL-L2.sphere: n=45 | mean=7.09 | std=1.55 | confidence=meaningful — Compact distribution (80% in 5-9 range). 15 contextual: 6 noticeable, 4 slight. Mixed music (6 neutral). Primary use: sleep (42%). YouTube: 5 views. Predicted 7.54 — aligns closely.
H-SL-L2.sphere_plain: Good for sleep, though opinions on the music vary. Works best as part of a bedtime routine.

H-SL-L3.name: Midnight
H-SL-L3.sphere: n=28 | mean=7.07 | std=1.68 | confidence=meaningful — Narrow variation (93% 5-9). 22 contextual: fast settle 5 min (8/22). Rhythm perception split (9 balanced, 7 slightly busy). YouTube: 3 views. Predicted 7.54 — aligns closely.
H-SL-L3.sphere_plain: Helps many reach restful states, though some find the rhythm slightly too active for deep sleep.

T-FC-L1.name: Compass
T-FC-L1.sphere: n=41 | mean=6.46 | std=1.82 | confidence=meaningful — 44% scores ≥7, no 10-responses. 23 contextual: 10/23 noticeable improvement. Rhythm: 9 slightly busy, 6 very settling. YouTube: 5 views. AutoGluon predicts 7.73 for L3, not L1 — refinement needed.
T-FC-L1.sphere_plain: Improves focus for some but many find it slightly busy — better for active work than passive relaxation.

T-FC-L2.name: Waypoint
T-FC-L2.sphere: n=32 | mean=7.19 | std=1.60 | confidence=meaningful — Strong 8-9 cluster (56%). 17 contextual: 5 moderate, 5 significant. Settle 10 min (9/17). Clustered with L3 (sim=0.828). YouTube: 4 views. Predicted 7.73 — close match.
T-FC-L2.sphere_plain: Excellent clarity for concentration — most users report sustained focus. Works within about 10 minutes.

T-FC-L3.name: Summit
T-FC-L3.sphere: n=35 | mean=7.63 | std=1.97 | confidence=meaningful — Highest THRIVING achiever (71% positive). 29 contextual: 11 significant, 7 noticeable. Settle 10-5 min. AutoGluon predicts 7.73 — observed exceeds. Cross-bucket routing to X-ME-L1 suggests motivation overlap.
T-FC-L3.sphere_plain: Best clarity protocol in the series — users achieve deep focus consistently. It's balanced and settling.

T-CF-L1.name: Ember
T-CF-L1.sphere: n=34 | mean=6.74 | std=1.73 | confidence=meaningful — Flat distribution, no clear efficacy signal. 21 contextual: 8/21 slight improvement — lowest tier for creative flow. Settle evenly split immediate/10 min. YouTube: 2 views. No AutoGluon zone prediction.
T-CF-L1.sphere_plain: Induces creative flow but less reliably — about half feel only slight benefits. Music is liked but doesn't stand out.

T-CF-L2.name: Current
T-CF-L2.sphere: n=24 | mean=6.79 | std=1.41 | confidence=meaningful — Tight variance (92% 6-9). 15 contextual: 5 significant, 4 moderate. Most analytic drift (sim=0.640). YouTube: 2 views. No zone prediction.
T-CF-L2.sphere_plain: Strong creative flow for many — over half report meaningful improvement. The music is loved by several listeners.

T-CF-L3.name: Aurora
T-CF-L3.sphere: n=18 | mean=7.28 | std=1.32 | confidence=developing — Highest THRIVING variant (67% positive). 25 contextual: 7/25 noticeable, 6 significant. Settle 10 min (7/25). No zone prediction.
T-CF-L3.sphere_plain: Surprising creativity boost — this one works well, with more perfect 10s than typical for its category.

T-MB-L1.name: Stone
T-MB-L1.sphere: n=25 | mean=7.04 | std=1.34 | confidence=meaningful — Stable 7-9 spread (84%). 23 contextual: 6 moderate, 5 noticeable. Primary use therapy/sleep (12/23). YouTube: 3 views. Predicted 7.69 — aligns closely.
T-MB-L1.sphere_plain: Reliable maintenance tool — works especially well in therapy sessions or as sleep prep. Most feel balanced afterward.

T-MB-L2.name: Axis
T-MB-L2.sphere: n=22 | mean=6.68 | std=2.03 | confidence=meaningful — Wide variance with outlier lows. 16 contextual: 5 noticeable, 4 moderate. Settle 5 min (6/16). YouTube: 4 views. Predicted 7.69 — gap suggests variance issue.
T-MB-L2.sphere_plain: Mixed balance effects — some achieve state equilibrium, others find it less effective personally. Music opinions are split.

T-MB-L3.name: Orbit
T-MB-L3.sphere: n=14 | mean=6.93 | std=1.73 | confidence=developing — Mode split at 7 and 9, potential subgroup. 19 contextual: 6 noticeable, 4 moderate. Notable drift (sim=0.666). YouTube: 3 views. Predicted 7.69 — close but n limits certainty.
T-MB-L3.sphere_plain: Promising maintenance effects with some settling issues. Small listener group means we're still learning.

X-ME-L1.name: Breeze
X-ME-L1.sphere: n=39 | mean=6.74 | std=1.94 | confidence=meaningful — Midpoint clustering, no clear pattern. 22 contextual: 7 moderate, 6 significant. Settle 20 min (6/22). Music loved by 10/22. YouTube: 8 views. AutoGluon predicts 8.23 (low-intensity zone) — largest cross-bucket gap in dataset.
X-ME-L1.sphere_plain: Mood and energy lift for most — nearly 80% feel improvement within 20 minutes. Music is loved by many.

X-ME-L2.name: Sunrise
X-ME-L2.sphere: n=25 | mean=6.76 | std=1.71 | confidence=meaningful — Core 7-8 mode (72%). 15 contextual: 7 significant, 4 moderate. Settle 20 min (4/15). YouTube: 8 views. Predicted 8.23 — notable gap.
X-ME-L2.sphere_plain: Good energy lift — significant improvement common. Takes longer to settle but delivers real results.

X-ME-L3.name: Updraft
X-ME-L3.sphere: n=18 | mean=6.28 | std=1.74 | confidence=developing — Lower tail concentration. 25 contextual: 9 noticeable, 6 significant. Activity: chores (5/25). YouTube: 4 views. Predicted 8.23 — large gap suggests context mismatch.
X-ME-L3.sphere_plain: Moderate mood improvement — works better for active tasks (chores) than passive relaxation. Some no-effect responses.

X-MD-L1.name: Footpath
X-MD-L1.sphere: n=22 | mean=6.36 | std=2.01 | confidence=meaningful — High variance (range 2-10). 17 contextual: 6 noticeable, 5 significant. Lowest pct_pos (45%). YouTube: 5 views. Predicted 7.88 — significant gap suggests routing issue.
X-MD-L1.sphere_plain: Motivational support is mixed — nearly half feel improvement but high variance suggests personal factors matter.

X-MD-L2.name: Trail
X-MD-L2.sphere: n=14 | mean=6.21 | std=1.63 | confidence=developing — Lower third-mode. 21 contextual: 6 noticeable, 5 moderate. Settle 20 min (5/21). YouTube: 7 views. Predicted 7.88 — gap warrants attention.
X-MD-L2.sphere_plain: Some lift in motivation but effects vary. Takes about 20 minutes to settle — not quick-acting.

X-MD-L3.name: Switchback
X-MD-L3.sphere: n=13 | mean=7.15 | std=2.38 | confidence=developing — Surprising high performer with distinct 9-10 tail (38%). 17 contextual: 8 moderate, 5 noticeable. Highest variance in TRANSFORMING. YouTube: 7 views. Predicted 7.88 — observes exceed despite n.
X-MD-L3.sphere_plain: Surprisingly good for motivation — many feel real improvement despite the small group. Higher variance than expected.

X-MC-L1.name: Cavern
X-MC-L1.sphere: n=24 | mean=6.75 | std=1.62 | confidence=meaningful — Balanced spread 63% ≥7. 25 contextual: 10 noticeable, 8 moderate. Music loved by 9/25. Drift notable (sim=0.660). YouTube: 8 views. Predicted 7.54 — moderate gap.
X-MC-L1.sphere_plain: Clears the mind for most — about half notice improvement. Music is loved by half the listeners.

X-MC-L2.name: Starlight
X-MC-L2.sphere: n=16 | mean=6.81 | std=1.64 | confidence=developing — Uniform distribution lacking 10s. 20 contextual: 7 significant, 6 moderate. Quick settle immediate (6/20). YouTube: 12 views. Predicted 7.54 — gap indicates potential.
X-MC-L2.sphere_plain: Significant improvement for many — nearly half report strong effects. Quick settle is common.

X-MC-L3.name: Cosmos
X-MC-L3.sphere: n=10 | mean=5.70 | std=2.45 | confidence=developing — ANOMALY: lowest mean, bimodal peaks at 5 and 7. 17 contextual: 9 noticeable, 3 moderate. 2 'worse' ratings — only protocol with negative outcomes. Drift (sim=0.748). YouTube: 8 views. Predicted 7.54 — large gap indicates design flaw or population mismatch.
X-MC-L3.sphere_plain: ANOMALY: This protocol needs work. Some listeners report it made things worse — we're investigating why.

sphere_commentary.overview:
Three series converge on expected profiles — HEALING stability, THRIVING edge cases, TRANSFORMING variance — while specific protocols diverge markedly.
• HEALING protocols show consistent high-confidence signals (H-OS-L1: n=95, mean=7.15), with crisis protocols performing as designed lower.
• THRIVING shows T-FC-L3 outlier (n=35, mean=7.63) and potential hold-phase issues across Creative Flow tier.
• TRANSFORMING X-MC-L3 (n=10, mean=5.7) flagged by multiple analyzers as population mismatch — needs screening question.
sphere_commentary.cross_series:
Design intent aligns with observed outcomes across arch types.
• HEALING DESCENT protocols (mean 6.98) maintain tight variance (std 1.77) — L1 variants lead across zones.
• THRIVING HOLD protocols (mean 6.96) show L3 advantage in Focus/Creative Flow — longer entrainment correlates with outcomes.
• TRANSFORMING ASCENT protocols (mean 6.59) carry highest spread (std 1.87) — motivation subset underperforms (-0.38 vs series).
sphere_commentary.anomalies:
Panel identifies four priority mismatches requiring investigation.
• X-MC-L3: Panel divided — mean=5.7 vs AutoGluon predicted=7.54, high std=2.45, bimodal distribution — suggests subpopulation effect.
• H-OS-L1: Strong efficacy (mean=7.15) + low YouTube reach (30 views) = undiscovered high performer.
• Cross-bucket routing: AutoGluon recommends X-ME-L1 for low-intensity zone (predicted 8.23) despite TRANSFORMING design — investigate routing logic.
• Crisis protocols: H-CR-L1 mean=6.35 (expected low), but AutoGluon predicts 7.96 — structural underperformance vs model expectations.
sphere_commentary.development_signals:
[CONVERGENT SIGNAL] Three protocols warrant immediate action based on multi-analyzer consensus.
• X-MC-L3 (n=10): Add anxiety screening question — low mean (5.7) and 2/17 'worse' ratings suggest population mismatch.
• H-AX-L1 (n=67): Refresh video metadata — strong efficacy (7.22) but only 7 YouTube views indicates reach failure.
• T-FC-L3 (n=35): Extend hold phase — qualitative shows 20+ min settlement needs, AutoGluon cross-bucket value (7.876).
sphere_commentary.embedding_analysis:
Embedding data reveals significant analytical instability across runs.
• CROSS-RUN DRIFT: T-CF-L2 (sim=0.640), X-MC-L1 (sim=0.660), T-MB-L3 (sim=0.666) show 15-20 point drops — data pattern shifts or model instability.
• SEMANTIC CLUSTERS: X-MD-L2 ↔ X-MD-L3 (0.832), T-FC-L2 ↔ T-FC-L3 (0.828) cluster tightly — validates progression design.
• Confidence: Low — sparse longitudinal data (3 runs), most protocols below 0.75 similarity threshold.

by_protocol_plain.X-MC-L3: ANOMALY: This protocol needs work. Some listeners report it made things worse — we're investigating why.
by_protocol_plain.X-MD-L1: Motivational support is mixed — nearly half feel improvement but high variance suggests personal factors matter.
by_protocol_plain.X-MD-L2: Some lift in motivation but effects vary. Takes about 20 minutes to settle — not quick-acting.
by_protocol_plain.X-MD-L3: Surprisingly good for motivation — many feel real improvement despite the small group. Higher variance than expected.
by_protocol_plain.X-ME-L1: Mood and energy lift for most — nearly 80% feel improvement within 20 minutes. Music is loved by many.
by_protocol_plain.X-ME-L2: Good energy lift — significant improvement common. Takes longer to settle but delivers real results.
by_protocol_plain.X-ME-L3: Moderate mood improvement — works better for active tasks (chores) than passive relaxation. Some no-effect responses.
